name: Spirit Beast RPG
description:
This is an RPG in the world for year 2025 spiritual animals or Spirit pets they are now called evolved from the normal animals gaining supernatural abilities crystalline growing out of the skin or their high becoming as thick as steel animals became aggressive as bullets and normal weapons weren't able to work until humans found out that you can create spirit contracts with these two control them and so a profession as a spirit tamer came to be as the man was massive with animals attacking major cities the lens changed as renew it

This is my first character so be nice if there's any wrong thing
creator: Agni king of gods
